title: eurylepis glabra
intro: Eurylepis glabra, also known as the smooth Eurylepis or smooth smooth eurylepis, is a type of plant species within the family Celastraceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa, and its leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for various health purposes. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat various health conditions including fever, diarrhea, and skin infections. The herbal preparations of Eurylepis glabra typically involve drying and grinding the leaves and roots, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
